personal.name: MD Firoj Ahmed
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building enterprise-grade systems with .NET, C# & modern web tech.
personal.shortBio: 1+ year professional experience at MNC. CSE graduate passionate about clean architecture, scalable APIs, and pixel-perfect UIs.

about.bio: I'm MD Firoj Ahmed, a dedicated Full-Stack Developer with 1+ year of professional experience at an MNC, where I primarily worked with .NET and C# in enterprise-level applications. I enjoy building scalable, maintainable, and user-focused web applications. My CSE background gives me strong foundations in algorithms, system design, and software engineering principles.
about.funFact: Refactored a legacy .NET codebase that cut API response time by 60% — with all tests still green!

projects.title: Enterprise Task Management System
projects.description: Full-featured project management platform for enterprise teams. Role-based access, real-time notifications via SignalR, Kanban boards, and reporting dashboards.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform API
projects.description: Robust RESTful API backend supporting multi-vendor architecture with JWT auth, Stripe payment integration, inventory management, and order tracking.

projects.title: Healthcare Appointment Portal
projects.description: Secure portal for scheduling healthcare appointments. Patients book, reschedule, cancel. Doctors view schedules and patient history with encrypted data handling.

projects.title: CLI Portfolio Generator
projects.description: Node.js command-line tool that scaffolds a developer portfolio from a config JSON, generating a static HTML site with one command.

projects.title: Real-time Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Responsive dashboard fetching live data from OpenWeatherMap API with forecasts, humidity, wind speed, and UV index chart visualizations.

projects.title: Markdown Blog Engine
projects.description: Lightweight static blog that parses Markdown files with search, categories, and RSS feed. Renders as a fully navigable blog site.

experience.title: Junior Software Developer
experience.description: Enterprise web applications with ASP.NET Core and C#. REST API development, SQL Server optimization, React frontend integration. Agile cross-functional collaboration.

experience.title: Full Stack .NET Developer Bootcamp
experience.description: 6-month intensive on ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, SQL Server, and React. Real-world projects with senior industry mentorship.

experience.title: B.Sc. Computer Science & Engineering
experience.description: Algorithms, data structures, software engineering, database management, computer networks. Programming contests and open-source contributions.

experience.title: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC)
experience.description: Science group, GPA 5.00. Mathematics, Physics, and Information & Communication Technology.
